titleStmt.title: SII 4.981: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 981. (A.R. No. 157 of 1893). IN THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . harē¨rlīlāvarāhasya daṁṣṭrādaṁḍassa pātu vaḥ . hēmādrikalaśā yatra dhātrīcchatraśriyaṁ dadhau . svasti śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbbulu 1440 [Agu nēṁṭi] bahudhānyasaṁvvatsara phālguṇa śu 10 śa śrīkākuḷapu teluṁggurāyalaku śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēvarāyamahārāyaluṁgāru daṁḍḍaṁ sama¨rppiṁcci yiccina dha(ṁ)¨rmmaśāsanamu . svāmini kuṁbhasaṁkramaṇapu(ṁ)ṇyakālamaṁddunu da¨rśiṁcci svāmikī koṁḍapalliśīmakuṁ jellivacci dēvarapuṁgōṭasthalaṁlōpali ya¨rlagaḍḍa grāmaṁ 1 nni mēḍūri stalaṁlōpali dēvaralaṁkkapalli grāmaṁ 1 nni dēvara
palligrāmaṁ 1 nni śrīkākuḷānanu svāmiki pratigrahalabdhamaina daśakadoḍḍiṁnni krayalabdhamaina satrālabhūmi . tōṁṭalu . nityavasarālu . śrīrāmānujakūṭamu . dvādasulu . sahitamaina bhūmi(ṁ)nni krottalaṁka . ciṁttalaṁkka . puṁḍrēgulapirāṭlapuluguḍulaṁkka . krō
sūranuṁ jellivacci kaṁbbāladoḍḍiṁnni . koṁḍḍavīṭiśīmalōni pedagāḍidapaṭṭuṁnu . vinikoṁḍḍaśīmalōni madhumaṁcciṁnni . svāmisaṁnnidhini dhārāpūrvakaṁgānu svāminityanaivēdyālaku(ṁ)nnu . [A]ṁggaraṁggavaibhavālakunnu yī [dha¨rmma] ṁgāri vaśānanuteluṁguvallabhuniki sa
ma¨rppiṁstimi ganaka Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu Avadhariṁccidi . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavēt . yī dha(ṁ)rmānaku yavvaru tappinānu gaṁgalōnu gōvubrāhmaṇa vadha cēśina pāpānaṁ bōUvāru .
yī Ayidugrāmālu(ṁ)nnu śrīvallabhuniki sama¨rpiṁci yī Ayidu grāmāla Āyaṁvallānuśēśina nitya naivēdyakaṭṭeḍa . dadyōdanaṁpaḷālu 4 Akāḷaprasādaṁpaḷyālu 4 Appālu 26 ki paḷlaṁ 1 Atirasāla paḷleṁ 1 vaḍali paḷleṁ 1 yiḍanakuḍumula paḷle 1 pappu
kūra kūralu neyi pergu paccaḷlu Ūruṁgāyelatōḍanu Āragiṁcci paḷlelu 60 nni Ānavāla prasādaṁ paḷlelu 2 veraśi Āragiṁcci paḷyālu 74 ḍebbaInāligiṁṭṭiki paḷle 1 ki Amutupaḍi na .-lekhkanu . kastūrika¨rpūraparimaḷasahitagaṁddhaṁ palālu 3At the end of the inscription are mark and the conch..
Digital edition of SII 4.981 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
